MINI MINUTES:
CROSS-DEFENDANT HERBERT CONTRACTORS, INC. AMENDED MOTION RE: APPLICATION FOR STAY OF ACTION AND PROCEEDINGS AS TO HERBERT CONTRACTORS PURSUANT TO SERVICE MEMBER'S RELIEF ACT.

APPEARANCES: Joseph Barber, Esq. of The Miller Law Firm 437-1800 for pltf & opposing party; Kristin Kerr, Esq. of Law Office of George William Wolff 788-1881 for moving party Herbert Contractors, Inc.; Sarah C. Pastran, Esq. of Lombardi, Loper & Conant, LLP 510/433-2600 & James F. Blake, Esq. of Burnham Brown 510/444-6800 (appearing via CourtCall) for deft/x-complainant Stack Construction.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION FOR STAY OF ACTION AS TO DEFENDANT HERBERT CONTRACTORS, INC. IS GRANTED. In addition, the Court ordered that the related action, case #CGC-09-495463 1826 Eddy Street Homeowners' Association vs. Basilica, LLC, is added to calendar for the same motion and is also granted. Order (under #495464) signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
